payload.reason: README + 'act help' document 'go install github.com/aac/act/cmd/act@latest' as the canonical bootstrap; alternates (brew, release, curl) documented as alternates. AC #4's 'clear path forward' is met by act-2204 (flip public + cut fresh tag) with its own verification AC.
